title: Skywalker Loop
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Skywalker Loop''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] maneuver invented by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. A [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] would loop their fighter around and pass through the exact same spot, only traveling in the opposite direction.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-XX-XX -->''[[Starfighter Battle Book: X-wing vs TIE Interceptor]]''
*<!-- 2007-12-18 -->[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]]
